name: Red Pepper Bruschetta with Feta
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Feta; crumble or chop fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the peppers, garlic, 1 tablespoon olive oil, lemon juice, scallions, and cheese.
2. Lightly brush the bread slices with olive oil.
3. Place the bread on a baking sheet.
4. Broil or grill each side until lightly toasted.
5. Top each slice with about 1 tablespoon of the pepper mixture.
